name: Nantucket Racquet Sports Association
description: Come play pickleball at Nantucket Racquet Sports Association in Nantucket, MA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Guest Play - $10/up to 90 minute session

name: The Nantucket Boys & Girls Club
description: The Nantucket Boys & Girls Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Nantucket, MA. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.
